---
name: "➕ Add / fix a resource"
about: Suggest a new link for the awesome list or report an outdated/broken one
title: "[resource] "
labels: ["resource", "help wanted"]
---

## Resource
- **Name + link:**
- **Section it belongs in:** (e.g. Official docs & SDKs / Hardware vendors / Example repos / Video & courses / Research)
- **One-line description (why it's worth a click):**

## Quality checklist
<!-- Tick what applies; see CONTRIBUTING.md for the bar. -->
- [ ] Authoritative or high-signal (official docs/repo, maintainer, recognized practitioner, or peer-reviewed)
- [ ] Currently maintained (repo commit within ~12 months, or clearly stable/complete)
- [ ] Links to the specific page/repo (not just a homepage)
- [ ] Adds something not already covered by an existing entry

## If reporting an outdated/broken resource
- **Existing entry:**
- **What's wrong:** (404 / moved / renamed / abandoned / superseded by …)
